name: Bangze Xiong
title: Java Backend Developer
bio: 11 years of Java development experience, focused on high-performance, high-concurrency system architecture design and implementation. Currently at Transsion Holdings, leading the architecture and development of core systems including cloud control platform, weather services, and FM audio platform.
highlights: 11 years of Java experience, led cloud control platform architecture with 5000 QPS
Large-scale distributed system architecture: microservices, high availability, dynamic degradation
Full-stack practice: end-to-end development from driver layer to application layer
Africa market localization expert with deep understanding of African mobile internet ecosystem
Cloud sync service for tens of millions of users with 99.99% availability

description: Led TPMS cloud control platform development, achieving 5000 QPS with stable high-concurrency performance
Designed weather service architecture integrating multiple data providers, smart degradation ensuring 99.9% availability, handling 500K daily requests
Built FM audio platform on Spring Cloud Alibaba, reducing audio loading latency by 63%
Developed remote device locking system (PayTiger) integrated with payment risk control, improving bad debt recovery by 40%
Developed legal compliance module for user agreement and privacy policy version management, GDPR compliant
Built cloud sync service for photos and contacts, achieving 99%+ multi-device data consistency
Developed Africa local life service platform with mobile top-up supporting multiple carriers
Maintained InBook laptop driver management system through full lifecycle
Designed and implemented security lock module for ROM system
Developed CMS for 'Tour Shanghai' App (domestic & international), MQ sync to Elasticsearch for full-text search
Built REX distribution system for travel agencies covering tickets, hotel packages, and visas
Implemented multi-dimensional search with Elasticsearch, rate limiting with Redis+Lua and Guava Cache
Spring Cloud microservices with Feign, Eureka service discovery, and Apollo config center
Built payment operations platform from scratch using Spring MVC + MyBatis + Dubbo + Zookeeper
Developed core modules: user management, transfers, and litigation review for P2P operations
Led automation operations project for server asset management and automated deployment
Developed China SAFE (State Administration of Foreign Exchange) e-government system
Built CSDC permission management system covering SSO, role-based access control
Participated in Huijinsuo P2P platform and Youqian Renxin lending app development

projects.name: TPMS Cloud Control Platform
projects.description: Cloud control platform for Transsion phones. Microservices architecture with load balancing and caching, achieving 5000+ QPS for full fleet device management.

projects.name: Weather Service Platform
projects.description: Integrated multiple weather data provider APIs with smart degradation mechanism. 99.9% availability, 500K daily requests, response time under 200ms.

projects.name: FM Audio Platform (OSFM)
projects.description: Independently designed microservices architecture. Innovative dual-version system (religious/non-religious). Custom HLS adaptive bitrate algorithm saving 45% bandwidth, reducing latency by 63%.

projects.name: PayTiger Remote Lock System
projects.description: IMEI-based remote device locking service integrated with payment risk control. Real-time device locking on anomalous transactions, improving bad debt recovery by 40%.

projects.name: Cloud Sync Service
projects.description: Cloud sync for tens of millions of users (photos/contacts). Multi-device data consistency algorithm achieving 99%+ accuracy.

projects.name: Tour Shanghai App
projects.description: Tour Shanghai App (domestic & international editions) covering news, tickets, tourism, hotels. Elasticsearch-powered multi-dimensional search with weighted ranking.
